title: Asymptotic Analysis Q2 - Cross-Array Binary Search
general_notes: No double deduction (except in points 9 and 10).
Students can use Theta or big-O notation with tight bounds.
Students may swap the roles of M and N (do not deduct for that typo).
Intended answers: T_f(M, N) = Theta(M log N) and T_g(N) = Theta(log N).

rubric_points.name: Splitting code into parts + referencing line numbers
rubric_points.target: Clear separation of f and g; loop vs non-loop code identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Analysis does not clearly separate f vs g, or loops vs non-loops, and line numbers are unclear or missing.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some attempt to separate components or refer to line numbers, but structure is incomplete or ambiguous.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Clear separation of f and g and identification of the call to g inside f's loop; line numbers referenced consistently.

rubric_points.name: Constant-time non-loop parts
rubric_points.target: All non-loop code in f and g is Theta(1).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Non-loop code not analysed or incorrectly claimed to be non-constant.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some constant-time segments identified but others missing.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: All non-loop regions stated as Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(M) iterations of the outer for loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(M).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(M) but with weak or incomplete justification.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(M) by explaining that i increments from 0 to M-1 once per iteration.

rubric_points.name: f(): Cost per iteration
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N) per iteration, dominated by the call to g(b, a[i]).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims Theta(1) per iteration or ignores the cost of g.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Recognises the call to g but does not establish Theta(log N) (e.g. says 'depends on log N or N' without committing).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: States Theta(log N) per iteration, justified by g being a binary search over b; other ops are Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(M log N) from Theta(M) iterations x Theta(log N) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: No multiplication of iteration count x per-iteration cost, or unrelated complexity.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Multiplies own values but final simplification or reasoning is unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(M) x Theta(log N) = Theta(M log N), with justification.

rubric_points.name: g(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N) iterations because the search interval halves each iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(log N) (e.g. claims Theta(N)).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(log N) but explanation incomplete (does not justify the halving of the interval).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(log N) by explaining that each iteration either returns or shrinks [l, r] by half.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Incorrect non-constant per-iteration cost claimed.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests operations are constant but lacks explicit Theta(1) justification.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Each iteration Theta(1): midpoint computation, two array accesses, two comparisons, one update.

rubric_points.name: g(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N) = Theta(log N) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Does not combine iteration count x per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Attempts multiplication using own values but unclear or partially derived.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(log N) x Theta(1) = Theta(log N), with justification.

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of g
rubric_points.target: T_g(N) = Theta(log N), summing the constant-time parts and the loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Runtime absent or incompatible with earlier analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(log N) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(log N) + Theta(1) = Theta(log N).

buckets.label: Internally consistent but incorrect final result
buckets.description: Final not Theta(log N), but correctly summed from own earlier values.

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of f
rubric_points.target: T_f(M, N) = Theta(M log N), accounting for non-loop parts + loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Final complexity missing/incorrect and not derived from loop analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(M log N) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(M log N) + Theta(1) = Theta(M log N).

buckets.label: Internally consistent but incorrect final result
buckets.description: Final not Theta(M log N), but correctly summed from own earlier values.
